nodes.name: file_sink.py
nodes.summary: Python integration test that creates Parquet/JSON/CSV sinks to S3/MinIO and verifies row counts and data correctness, including batching behavior for file sink connectors.

nodes.name: gen_data
nodes.summary: Generates sample Arrow record batches with all supported data types for file sink tests.

nodes.name: do_test
nodes.summary: Sets up a RisingWave source table and file sink, waits for output, and asserts row count correctness via psycopg2.

nodes.name: do_sink
nodes.summary: Creates multiple file sinks with different formats and configurations, writing data and verifying S3 output file counts.

nodes.name: test_file_sink_batching
nodes.summary: Tests the file sink batching behavior by verifying that output files are created with the correct row batching limits.

nodes.name: file_source.py
nodes.summary: Python integration test for S3/MinIO file sources that verifies streaming and batch reads of Parquet, JSON, and CSV files including Parquet struct schema edge cases.

nodes.name: _test_parquet_struct_field_subset
nodes.summary: Tests reading Parquet files where the table schema is a strict subset of the file's struct fields.

nodes.name: _test_parquet_struct_missing_field_in_file
nodes.summary: Tests reading Parquet files where the table schema has a field absent from the actual file's struct.

nodes.name: _test_parquet_case_insensitive
nodes.summary: Tests case-insensitive column name matching when reading Parquet files into RisingWave sources.

nodes.name: gen_data
nodes.summary: Generates sample file data rows with id and name fields for file source tests.

nodes.name: format_json
nodes.summary: Formats generated data as newline-delimited JSON strings for upload to S3.

nodes.name: format_csv
nodes.summary: Formats generated data as CSV strings with optional header for upload to S3 file sources.

nodes.name: do_test
nodes.summary: End-to-end test runner that uploads generated files to S3, creates a RisingWave source, and verifies ingested row counts.

nodes.name: test_batch_read
nodes.summary: Tests batch SELECT queries directly against S3 file sources without materialized views.

nodes.name: upload_to_s3_bucket
nodes.summary: Writes generated file data to local disk then uploads the files to MinIO S3 at the specified path prefix.

nodes.name: check_for_new_files
nodes.summary: Polls RisingWave until a source table reaches the expected row count after new files are uploaded to S3.

nodes.name: requirements.txt
nodes.summary: Python dependency list for S3 e2e test scripts requiring psycopg2, pyarrow, minio, and numpy.

nodes.name: append_only_sink.slt
nodes.summary: End-to-end test for append-only sink configuration and behavior.

nodes.name: auto_schema_change.slt
nodes.summary: End-to-end test for automatic schema change propagation from source to sink connectors.

nodes.name: blackhole_sink.slt
nodes.summary: End-to-end test for the blackhole sink that discards all output data.

nodes.name: issue_24367.slt
nodes.summary: Regression test for issue #24367 involving a bug in sink handling.

nodes.name: cassandra_sink.slt
nodes.summary: End-to-end test for Cassandra sink connector data write and verification.

nodes.name: clickhouse_sink.slt
nodes.summary: End-to-end test for ClickHouse sink connector data write and verification.

nodes.name: create_sink_as.slt
nodes.summary: End-to-end test for CREATE SINK AS SELECT syntax to create sinks from query results.

nodes.name: deltalake_rust_sink.slt
nodes.summary: End-to-end test for the Delta Lake sink connector implemented in Rust.

nodes.name: doris_sink.slt
nodes.summary: End-to-end test for Apache Doris sink connector data write and verification.

nodes.name: elasticsearch_sink.result
nodes.summary: Expected result file for the Elasticsearch sink e2e test.

nodes.name: elasticsearch_sink.slt
nodes.summary: End-to-end test for Elasticsearch sink connector data write and index verification.

nodes.name: elasticsearch_with_pk_sink.result
nodes.summary: Expected result file for the Elasticsearch sink with primary key e2e test.

nodes.name: elasticsearch_with_route.result
nodes.summary: Expected result file for the Elasticsearch sink with routing e2e test.

nodes.name: elasticsearch.py
nodes.summary: Python helper script for Elasticsearch sink e2e tests that validates indexed documents via the Elasticsearch REST API.

nodes.name: file_sink.slt
nodes.summary: End-to-end test for local file sink connector basic functionality.

nodes.name: force_compaction_sink.slt
nodes.summary: End-to-end test for sink with forced compaction behavior to reduce storage fragmentation.

nodes.name: http_sink_mock_server.py
nodes.summary: Python mock HTTP server that records POST request bodies and headers to disk for HTTP sink e2e test verification.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Starts the mock HTTP server on a configurable port, registers a SIGTERM handler, and serves requests until terminated.

nodes.name: http_sink.slt
nodes.summary: End-to-end test for HTTP sink connector verifying POST delivery of streaming output rows.

nodes.name: alter_kafka_sink_props.slt
nodes.summary: End-to-end test for ALTER SINK property changes on Kafka sink connectors.

nodes.name: append_only1.result
nodes.summary: Expected result file for the Kafka append-only sink test variant 1.

nodes.name: append_only2.result
nodes.summary: Expected result file for the Kafka append-only sink test variant 2.

nodes.name: avro-decimal.slt
nodes.summary: End-to-end test for Avro decimal type serialization in Kafka sink connectors.
